note: seq=129: CZDS status-publish fix done RIGHT -- patch the known-good on-box collector IN PLACE (avoids the Windows-mount truncation that corrupted seq-127, which correctly compile-failed+rolled back). Adds load_status_env() (self-loads STATUS_*/DB env stripping `export `) + its call; idempotent; compile-verified in the step; reruns the collector so czds.json publishes.

steps.note: seq=129: in-place patch for czds.json publishing.

steps.content:
import os,py_compile
p="/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_czds_import.py"
s=open(p).read()
if "load_status_env" not in s:
    fn="
def load_status_env():
    for q in ("/etc/atlas/autopull.env","/etc/atlas/db.env"):
        if not os.path.exists(q):
            continue
        for ln in open(q):
            ln=ln.strip()
            if ln.startswith("export "): ln=ln[7:]
            if "=" not in ln or ln.startswith("#"): continue
            k,v=ln.split("=",1); k=k.strip(); v=v.strip().strip(chr(34)).strip(chr(39))
            if k and k not in os.environ: os.environ[k]=v

"
    s=s.replace("def authenticate(u, pw):", fn+"def authenticate(u, pw):",1)
    s=s.replace("        sys.exit(selftest())
","        sys.exit(selftest())
    load_status_env()
",1)
    open(p,"w").write(s); print("patched")
else:
    print("already patched")
py_compile.compile(p,doraise=True); print("compiles ok")
